headline: Is It Time To Revisit PACCAR (PCAR) After Its Recent Share Price Pullback
summary: Some investors may be wondering if PACCAR at around US$116 is still offering value after a strong run, or if most of the opportunity is already priced in. The stock has pulled back about 8.6% over the last week and 1.4% over the last month, yet it still sits on a 4.0% year to date return and 32.4% over the past year. This naturally raises questions about what the current price really reflects. Recent coverage has highlighted PACCAR's position in the capital goods sector and its longer term...
